MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (D501)

Appearances on WED-FEB-20-2013:
Plaintiffs DIPA S. PATEL, , dba AMAZON HOTEL and K. MIRANDA, Prop. Mgr. appear in propria persona
Defendant HANRY R. MASHANTA is present with Attorney Mehran Fardis representing defendant through limited scope

Judge Pro Tem Jon Polland, counsel, and litigants confer in Dept. 502B for settlement discussions.

This case settles. The parties enter into a signed agreement which is filed. The trial date of FEB-25-2013 is vacated.
